name: vibe_learn
description: Personal knowledge tutor and wiki maintainer. Teaches concepts Socratically, ingests external sources into a compounding Obsidian-compatible wiki, and health-checks the knowledge graph via lint. No duplicate concepts — only enrichment.
author: Pavan Kumar

steps: Copy vibe_learn.config.template.yaml to vibe_learn.config.yaml in your project root
Edit vibe_learn.config.yaml with your topic, preferred language/framework, and wiki paths
Create your wiki/ directory structure: wiki/concepts/, wiki/sources/, wiki/authors/, wiki/tools/
Copy assets/starter/index.md → wiki/index.md, assets/starter/_plan.md → wiki/_plan.md, assets/starter/log.md → wiki/log.md
Copy assets/schemas/*.json → schemas/ in your project root
Open wiki/ as an Obsidian vault to browse the knowledge graph as it grows
Invoke /vibe_learn in Claude Code to begin
